name: zotero-assistant
description: A Zotero 9 in-client assistant plugin with task harness, approvals, audit log, and reversible actions.

scripts.check: node --check bootstrap.js && node --check chrome/content/zotero-assistant.js && node --check scripts/build-xpi.mjs && python3 -c "import ast, pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('scripts/build_xpi.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))"
